basic_details.job_title: DLSA Bhojpur Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest District Legal Services Authority Bhojpur (DLSA Bhojpur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Para Legal Volunteer (P.L.V) posts! Published under Advt. No. 07/2026 at Bhojpur District Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 40 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing Matric Pass qualification can apply offline up to 08 June 2026. Find all details about the DLSA Bhojpur Para Legal Volunteer (P.L.V) new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Matric Pass with knowledge of Hindi and English reading and writing.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bhojpur.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Bhojpur Para Legal Volunteer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DLSA Bhojpur Para Legal Volunteer (P.I.V) posts is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Para Legal Volunteer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies for the Para Legal Volunteer (P.I.V) post announced by the District Legal Services Authority Bhojpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Matriculation (10th grade) and possess knowledge of Hindi and English reading and writing to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Para Legal Volunteer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 750/- per working day.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Para Legal Volunteer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority Bhojpur: https://bhojpur.dcourts.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DLSA Bhojpur?
faq.answer: The official website for District Legal Services Authority Bhojpur is https://bhojpur.dcourts.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 07/2026.
